title: bromus scoparius subsp. chrysopogon
intro: Bromus scoparius subsp. chrysopogon, also known as golden feather grass or mountain brome, is a subspecies of grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Bromus scoparius subsp. chrysopogon include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparation of this plant typically involves making teas or infusions from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
